description_long: This is a classic ring-shaped donut with a thick, glossy layer of pale green icing covering the top surface. The donut itself has a golden-brown, slightly uneven baked texture, with a soft, airy appearance typical of yeast-raised pastries. The icing is smooth and shiny, with some natural drips and irregularities along the edge, suggesting it was freshly applied. There are no visible toppings such as sprinkles or nuts, and the donut appears unadorned aside from the icing. The bottom and sides of the donut are exposed, showing the contrast between the baked dough and the vibrant icing. The donut is unwrapped and not presented with any packaging or branding.
description: A golden-brown ring donut topped with glossy pale green icing, unadorned and unwrapped. The icing is smooth and slightly drips over the edges.
description_view_0: The donut is seen from a slightly elevated angle, showing the even, glossy green icing and the central hole, with the icing smoothly covering the top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the uniformity of the icing and the soft, rounded edges of the donut, with no visible drips on this side.
description_view_2: From this angle, a noticeable drip in the icing is visible on the right side, adding a touch of realism to the glaze.
description_view_3: This view shows more pronounced icing drips on the left, with the donut's golden-brown side and bottom clearly visible.
attribute_icing_type: pale green sugar glaze, smooth and glossy with some natural drips
attribute_placement_location: unwrapped, isolated on a plain surface
